subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath sent down the Table, manifested His grace, perfected His testimony, consummated His Word and revealed it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل المائده و اظهر النعمه و اتم الحجه و اکمل الکلمه و ابرز
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
